testcase.name: test_mom_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'user' in {'email': 'sharemom2_1771213474@test.com', 'full_name': 'Share Test Mom', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': None, ...}

testcase.name: test_doula_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'user' in {'email': 'doula2_1771213474@test.com', 'full_name': 'Test Doula Sarah', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': None, ...}

testcase.name: test_mom_team_api

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'doula': {'name': 'Test Doula Sarah', 'picture': None, 'profile': {'accepting_new_clients': True, 'bio': 'Experienced birth and postpartum doula', 'in_marketplace': False, 'location_city': 'Los Angeles', ...}, 'user_id': 'user_508e3b9c3ce4'}, 'midwife': None}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_doula_api.py:366: in test_mom_team_api assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'doula': {'name': 'Test Doula Sarah', 'picture': None, 'profile': {'accepting_new_clients': True, 'bio': 'Experienced birth and postpartum doula', 'in_marketplace': False, 'location_city': 'Los Angeles', ...}, 'user_id': 'user_508e3b9c3ce4'}, 'midwife': None}, list)
